assertions.description: Bias voltage divider R24 (10K from +9V) / R25 (10K to GND) creating +4.5V mid-rail bias not detected as voltage_divider. C15 (47uF) and C12 (0.1uF) bypass this node.
REVIEW: Potentiometers VR1/VR2/VR3 (Device:R_Potentiometer_US) classified as type other instead of potentiometer
